name: Spinach-Grapefruit Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 small Head Radicchio, Separated Into Leaves
2 large Pink Grapefruit, Peeled and Sectioned
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems from spinach.
2. Wash and pat dry on paper towels. Tear into bite-size pieces.
3. Combine spinach and radicchio in a large bowl. Toss well.
4. In a jar, combine lemon juice, oil, sugar, pepper, paprika, salt, and red pepper. Cover tightly and shake vigorously.
5. Add the dressing to the spinach mixture and toss gently.
6. Add papaya, orange, and onion. Toss gently.
(Fat 3.8. Chol. 0.)
